hypothesis: XAUUSD M15 trends strongly during London+NY overlap (12:00-16:00 UTC). Pullbacks to EMA21 within an EMA50>EMA200 trend, confirmed by RSI14 recovering from the 40-50 zone (mirrored for shorts), provide asymmetric trend-continuation entries — addressing the prior-gen failure of pure mean-reversion on gold.

regime_filter.description: Require trending regime: ADX14 >= 20 AND ATR percentile >= 40 AND in LDN/NY overlap.

entry_rules.long: EMA50 > EMA200 AND prior bar low touched/crossed below EMA21 AND current bar closes > EMA21 AND RSI14 crossed up through 50 from below 50 in last 3 bars
entry_rules.short: EMA50 < EMA200 AND prior bar high touched/crossed above EMA21 AND current bar closes < EMA21 AND RSI14 crossed down through 50 from above 50 in last 3 bars

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.5x ATR14 below entry (long) / above (short), or below/above EMA50, whichever is farther but capped at 2.5x ATR
exit_rules.take_profit: partial 50% at 1.5x ATR14; trail remainder at EMA21 or 2.0x ATR14 chandelier
exit_rules.time_stop: close after 32 M15 bars (~8h) if not filled targets
